title: Revival
body:
# Revival

**Revival** is a universal tech-magic modpack suitable for both singleplayer and playing with friends. The main focus is on **industrial technology, automation, and farming**, with a smooth introduction through a quest system.

## 🔧 Features

- Over **100 carefully selected mods** for balance and stability  
- Key mods:  
  - ⚙️ *Mekanism* — progressive technology  
  - 📦 *Refined Storage* — convenient storage and automation  
  - 🌱 *Mystical Agriculture* — simplified resource gathering  
  - 🌸 *Botania* — plant-based magic  
- Custom items and recipes  
- Custom GUI  
- All mods also include Russian localization for Russian-speaking users
- Quests (available only on [minecraft-inside](https://minecraft-inside.ru/modpacks/184916-revival.html))

## 💻 Requirements & Info

- Suitable for mid-range PCs  
- Requires at least 4GB RAM  
- Modpack size: ~300 MB  
- Includes optimization mods  
- Comes with shaders and resource packs

## 📬 Contact & Support

- Telegram: [@bios_91](https://t.me/bios_91)  
- Discord: [rraigos](https://discord.com/users/637352123276722196)
